title: Animated Revolver Guns
body:
# ---**ANIMATED REVOLVERS**---

**Turns bows into animated single-action revolvers with custom arm texture support!**
## INCLUDED FEATURES 
- Custom Sneak/Offhand sneak
- Custom Pull/Offhand pull
- SPIN ANIMATION!  (Activated by the "Pick Block" keybind)
- Cool aim down sights perspective in offhand!


 
--**How To Change Arm Textures**--
1. Properly un-zip the recourcepack
2. Navigate and find the **"**item**"** folder inside the **"**textures**"** folder
3. find and delete the **"**skin.png**"**
4. Put your skin in and rename it to **"**skin.png**"**
5. Properly Re-Zip the recourcepack
 
(Comes built-in with the default Alex Skin's arms)

**WORKS WITH SLIM SKINS ONLY** (for now :3)

**OFFHAND AND MAINHAND WILL BE REVERSED IN   "Main Hand: Left"   MODE**
